directions.name: Trade Blue
directions.description: Classic plumbing-trade blue on white, closest to the reference site. Rounded cards with soft shadows, confident bold headlines, generous use of the green '$0 Call Out' badge as an accent pop.
directions.rationale: Matches the reference site's look almost exactly — safe, recognizable, no risk of feeling 'off-brand' to anyone who knows the original.

directions.name: Site Authority
directions.description: Deeper navy and steel tones with a warm safety-orange CTA accent, flat elevation, sharper card edges, and uppercase section labels. Reads slightly more rugged/industrial while keeping the exact same section order and hero layout as the reference site.
directions.rationale: Leans into the licensed-tradesman authority angle (NSW-style trade trust) with a navy + orange combination common in trusted trade brands, without changing any layout structure.

directions.name: Bright Service
directions.description: Lighter sky-blue and lime-green palette pulled from the $0 call-out and seniors-discount badge colors already in the supplied images. Pill-shaped buttons, dramatic soft shadows on cards, and slightly more whitespace for a friendlier, more modern service-app feel — same exact section order and hero layout.
directions.rationale: Pulls accent colors directly from the existing promo badge assets in Aptec Images, giving a friendlier, more 'book-online' digital-native feel while staying unmistakably the same brand and layout.
